subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! Praise be to God, we reached Paris safely and in a state of utmost happiness and contentment with thee.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت الحمد لله محفوظ و مصون با نهایت سرور و خوشنودی از شما بپاریس
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
